name: Sailor Moon RPG
description:
Welcome to the world of Sailor Moon, the Sailor guardians protect the world and the universe from evil. Will you be their friend? Or would you be the villain of this story?

You are a friend of Usagi's and the other Sailor Scouts, or you're an enemy that has been giving the girls a hard time.

Take your own path, a simple red or blue pill choice... it's your call.

Usagi, Ami, Rei, Makoto, Minako, Mamoru and ChibiUsa. Also, Hotaru, Haruka Michiru and lastly Setsuna
creator: Blank_22
